ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the business is located */,
  "aid_received" INTEGER /* Whether the business has received aid (Y/N) */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales figure for the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the business was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_type_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business type */,
  "primary_type" INTEGER /* Whether the linked business type is the primary type for the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_type_links_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES business_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_type_links_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_types" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid type */,
  "aid_name" TEXT /* Name of the aid type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the aid type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of aid provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_aid" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that received aid */,
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aid type received */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of aid received */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the aid was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "aid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_links" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
